nasb.text: Your neck is like a tower of ivory, Your eyes like the pools in Heshbon By the gate of Bath-rabbim; Your nose is like the tower of Lebanon, Which faces toward Damascus.

esv.text: Your neck is like an ivory tower. Your eyes are pools in Heshbon, by the gate of Bath-rabbim. Your nose is like a tower of Lebanon, which looks toward Damascus.

cnv.text: 你的頸項如象牙塔； 你的眼像希實本城內， 巴特．拉併門旁的水池； 你的鼻子好像黎巴嫩的高塔， 居高臨下朝著大馬士革。

ccb.text: 你的脖子如象牙塔， 眼睛好像希实本境内巴特·拉并门旁的水池。 你的鼻子好像眺望大马士革的黎巴嫩塔。
